vibe: Trustworthy, grounded, clear, and community-focused. Modern earthy fintech with calm neutrals and a mature green to reflect the M-Pesa root.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for major card padding. Gaps in grid should be gap-6 or gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.landing_page_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A) with asymmetry. Mix 2-col and 1-col cards.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Progressive disclosure. Primary metric top-left.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Dashboard widgets are solid surface (#FFFFFF) on off-white background (#F9F8F6) with subtle 1px border (border-border). Soft shadow on hover only. No heavy drop shadows by default.

components.buttons: Shadcn UI Button. Rounded-xl or rounded-full. Primary uses #1A4D2E, hover #133922. Secondary uses #E27D60.
components.cards: Flat, 1px solid border (#E2E0D8), no shadow. Rounded-2xl.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input/Select. Background #FFFFFF, border #E2E0D8, focus ring #1A4D2E. Text Manrope.
components.charts: Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Use Forest Green and Terracotta for chart lines/bars. Avoid default Tailwind blues.
components.navigation: Sticky top nav with Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-border/40). Always show key links and main CTA.

landing_page.vibe: High visual impact, emotional storytelling about community savings.

dashboard_user.layout: Sidebar navigation or top nav. Main area: 3-column grid.

saccos_page.layout: List/Grid view of available Saccos. Detail page shows Members list and horizontal bar charts or radial progress showing % contribution.

dashboard_admin.layout: Dense data table view using Shadcn Table. Overview cards for Total Platform Savings, Total Users, Total Saccos.

hero_abstract.description: Abstract 3D interlocking coins representing community growth.
hero_abstract.usage: Landing page hero section right side image.

lifestyle_fintech.description: Elegant smartphone on oak table with plant.
lifestyle_fintech.usage: Features section or about section on landing page.

mobile_payment_1.usage: Personal Savings / M-Pesa integration feature showcase.

community_sacco_2.description: Four friends laughing and chatting outdoors.

icons.style: Use moderate stroke-width (2px), keep them crisp.

testing_rules.data_testid_requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key data displays (balance, sacco percentages) MUST have a role-based data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Initialize Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, charts, and tables.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Implement MOCKED M-Pesa deposit/withdraw flows. Users should type an amount and phone number, then simulate a prompt and update balance.
Sacco mathematics: Sum total Sacco balance. For each member, calculate (member_contribution / total_balance) * 100 to show their percentage.
Authentication can be simulated or built via a mock DB (e.g., local storage or simple SQLite/JSON) so user state persists across dashboard reloads.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard checks for an 'admin' role or specific admin credentials.
Do not use generic blue gradients. Stick to the Earthy palette provided.
